sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68267" key="moira/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μοιρ-άς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> l. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μοιρίς</foreign> (q. v.).</entryFree>
